## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation fix (typo, outdated API, wrong signature)
- [ ] New documentation (new API page, new addon doc)
- [ ] New pattern / template (working code example)
- [ ] New knowledge base article
- [ ] AI skill update
- [ ] MCP / tool integration
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Code examples use real Perception.cx API signatures (not invented)
- [ ] Enma code follows coding standards (`uint64` addresses, `f` suffix, null guards)
- [ ] `./setup.sh` still works on a clean clone
- [ ] Files are in the correct directory (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
